## ⚠️ IMPORTANT
**Do not publicly disclose security vulnerabilities.** 
Please email details to **security@agentforge.ai** instead of creating a public issue.

## Vulnerability Type
- [ ] Authentication / Authorization
- [ ] Data Exposure
- [ ] Injection
- [ ] Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)

- [ ] Other
